subject: [PATCH v4 02/21] swap: rearrange the swap header file

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch rearranges the swap header file (include/linux/swap.h) to group related functions into categories such as lifecycle swap, swap cache API, and physical swapfile allocator and device API. The functions are reorganized for better structure and clarity, but no functional changes are made. Extern keywords are removed from the functions that were rearranged.
